name: Chocolate Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the eggs, sugar, buttermilk, chocolate, baking soda, ginger, salt, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Gradually add the flour and stir until a smooth batter forms.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
4. Using a doughnut scoop or small spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil.
5. Fry the doughnuts in batches until golden brown on both sides.
6. Remove the doughnuts from the oil and place them on paper towels to drain excess grease.
7. Allow the doughnuts to cool before serving.
